# Home Assistant Pool Copilot Integration

This is a custom Home Assistant integration for Pool Copilot API.

## Project Structure
- `custom_components/poolcopilot/` - Integration files
- Follow Home Assistant custom component guidelines
- Use async/await patterns for API calls
- Implement proper error handling and logging

## Development Guidelines
- Follow Home Assistant coding standards
- Use type hints for all functions
- Implement proper configuration flow
- Add comprehensive error handling
- Include proper logging with _LOGGER
